fields.description: Default float amount per shift. Configurable per venue.
fields.label: Float Amount

fields.description: Default stay duration in minutes for all asset types.
fields.label: Default Stay Duration (Minutes)

fields.description: IP address of the Brother QL-820NWB label printer.
fields.label: Printer IP Address

fields.description: Label template name for the Brother QL-820NWB.
fields.label: Printer Label Template Name

fields.description: Extra minutes after stay duration before overtime indicator fires on the asset board.
fields.label: Grace Minutes

fields.description: Minutes before a paid-but-unassigned session is flagged for cleanup.
fields.label: Assignment Timeout (Minutes)

fields.description: Task 35 — Daily orphan-invoice integrity check threshold. Submitted POS Sales Invoices below this amount are silently skipped (no alert) when found unlinked to any POS Closing Entry. Default 0 alerts on every orphan; raise to e.g. 5.00 if noise becomes a problem in practice. See hamilton_erp/integrity_checks.py.
fields.label: Orphan Invoice Alert Threshold

fields.description: Show the Waitlist tab on the Asset Board. Placeholder for Phase 2.
fields.label: Show Waitlist Tab

fields.description: Show the Other tab on the Asset Board. Used for venue-specific asset categories.
fields.label: Show Other Tab

fields.description: Variance tolerance as a percentage of the larger amount in the three-way comparison. Lower values flag smaller variances; raise this when high-volume cash days produce noisy false positives. Default 2.0% per the original variance contract — see decisions_log.md amendment 2026-05-03 (DEC-068).
fields.label: Cash Variance Tolerance (%)

fields.description: Minimum variance tolerance floor in dollars. The effective tolerance for any reconciliation is max(percent * larger_amount, minimum). A flat $0.05 floor is too strict for real cash handling — a single mis-counted bill would flag a $500 drop as non-Clean. Default $1.00.
fields.label: Cash Variance Tolerance Minimum ($)

fields.description: IP address of the Epson TM-T20III thermal receipt printer (Ethernet/WiFi). Required when Receipt Printer Enabled is checked. See DEC-098.
fields.label: Receipt Printer IP

fields.description: Enable receipt printing. When unchecked the dispatch is short-circuited (dev escape hatch — see DEC-098).
fields.label: Receipt Printer Enabled

fields.description: CRA-issued GST/HST registration number printed on every receipt (per DEC-097). No default — paste in via Desk on first install. Blank value blocks cash sales (no receipt = no completed sale, per DEC-098 / R-012 precedent).
fields.label: GST/HST Registration Number
